TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_DeJuan_Blair, title = DeJuan_Blair, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/DeJuan_Blair} }

S.FORM: == DeJuan Blair == DeJuan Blair hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1989, byacing te 4 ru 22 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Pennsylvania, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 201 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 122 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2009 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu San Antonio Spurs. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== DeJuan Blair == DeJuan Blair hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1989, byacing te 4 ru 22 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Pennsylvania, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 201 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 122 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2009 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu San Antonio Spurs. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *e*uan βlair == *e*uan βlair ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa penns~ɕjl*ania, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu s~ɕan antonio s~ɕpurs~ɕ. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
